title: Availability Query
description: Query parameters for retrieving available scheduling slots from a provider.

providerId.description: Identifier of the scheduling provider to query.

dateRange.description: Date-time window to search for available slots.

start.description: Earliest date-time to include in the search.

end.description: Latest date-time to include in the search.

duration.description: Desired appointment duration in ISO 8601 format (e.g. PT30M).

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier for interpreting the results (e.g. Europe/Berlin).

filters.description: Optional filters to narrow down available slots.

serviceType.description: Type of service requested (e.g. consultation, onboarding).

staffId.description: Specific staff member to book with.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous query.
